title: [Skyship, The Spire]
description: A gem-studded electrum spire rises out of the middle of the area's rough stone floor.  Rough, cloudy rubies are set across one side of the spire, arranged patterns that mirror the runic symbols painted across the floors, bulkheads, and ceiling in deep crimson.  A solid painted white line encircles the spire.  Set on the spire's side of the line is a series of unlit, ash grey candles.
